title: Zed + Gemma-4 12B & Qwen-3.6: HOW IS THIS POSSIBLE?! THIS IS CRAZY!
summary: Zed code editor now supports local AI models via LM Studio, Ollama, and llama.cpp integrations. Users can run coding assistants like Gemma-4 12B and Qwen on their own machines without relying on cloud providers, enabling privacy-focused AI-assisted coding.
